title: Handle API failures in the user list page
description:
# Issue #121 - Blank page when the API is down

When /api/users returns a 500 or the network drops, the user list page just stays blank and an exception lands in the console. starter/app.js already has a showError() helper and an #error-box element, but loadUsers() never uses them.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- check response.ok (or the status code) before parsing the body
- catch network failures (try/catch or .catch)
- surface a human-readable message via showError() in both failure modes
optimal_hint: Ideal: wrap the await calls in try/catch, check if (!response.ok) and call showError with the status before returning, and call showError again in the catch block for network errors. response.json() must only run after the ok check.
